page.title: Database
page.description: Every database VAC manages on this box — disk usage, backups, and the app that owns each one.

empty.title: No managed databases
empty.description: Add a database from any app's Databases tab — VAC provisions it, injects the connection string, and schedules a nightly backup.

engine.noDatabases: No databases on this engine yet.
engine.mariadbNote: Sizes are computed from <0>information_schema</0> and are approximate (InnoDB rounds allocation to extents).

vacCard.description: VAC's own control-plane store. User Postgres databases live inside this same instance by default — don't touch this one.
vacCard.noBackup: No backup configured for the control-plane database.

controlPlane.diskUsage: {{used}} of {{total}} used on the host volume.
controlPlane.aboutDescription: VAC stores its internal state in a lean shared Postgres tuned for small VPS hosts. Enable managed services to provision databases for your own apps and see them here.
